title: MCLounge Vanilla Pack
description: A performance-focused vanilla+ pack, made for optimal compatibility with both singleplayer and servers.
body:
# MCLounge Vanilla Pack

**This pack is a performance-focused vanilla+ pack which aims to improve your Minecraft 
experience in both singleplayer and multiplayer.**

Features
- Performance boost
- Optifine/Iris shader pack support
- In-game skin changer and cosmetics (capes, hats etc.)
- Compatible with vanilla servers (Entirely client-side)
- In-game online world hosting
- Blender-like building mode (Copy/paste, brushes, and more)
- Connected textures
- Optifine resource pack features
- Voice chat
- Zoom (Like Optifine)
- Immersive sound physics
- Ambient sounds
- Useful resource packs and shader packs

## ![Discord Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/482cc4e33c6588bbde0985618a12e1fc9a50ff22_0.webp) Join our Discord server for support and info!
**https://discord.gg/ZGDJeZXuUA**
